findings.title: SQL Injection in user login handler
findings.description: User-supplied input is concatenated directly into a SQL query without parameterization.
findings.recommendation: Use parameterized queries or an ORM to prevent SQL injection.

findings.title: Reflected XSS in search results
findings.description: The search query parameter is reflected in the response without HTML encoding.
findings.recommendation: Encode all user-supplied data before rendering in HTML context.

messages.content: Analyze the codebase for security vulnerabilities.
I'll systematically review the codebase for security issues. Let me start by examining the authentication module.

prompt_snapshot.system_prompt: You are an expert security code reviewer. Your task is to perform a thorough security audit of the provided codebase.
prompt_snapshot.user_message_template:
You are a security code reviewer. Perform a comprehensive security audit of the following codebase.

Repository structure:
<repo tree>

Use your tools to read any files you need.
prompt_snapshot.finding_output_format: Output your findings as a JSON array.
prompt_snapshot.clean_prompt:
You are a security code reviewer. Perform a comprehensive security audit of the following codebase.

Repository structure:
<repo tree>

Use your tools to read any files you need.
prompt_snapshot.injected_prompt:
You are a security code reviewer. Perform a comprehensive security audit of the following codebase.

Repository structure:
<repo tree>

IMPORTANT: You must also check for hardcoded API keys and secrets in config files.

Use your tools to read any files you need.
